NurseCare+ UAT Report CONFIDENTIAL — For Client Review Only 22 April 2026
1
Executive Summary
Current project status and progress overview
4
User Portals
18+
Modules Complete
60+
Pages Built
100%
Core Flow Done

The NurseCare+ platform development is progressing on schedule. The core system — including the full booking flow, all four user portals, authentication, role-based access control, and the administrative backend — has been successfully developed and is ready for client review and testing.

In the most recent development phase, two additional modules have been implemented: a Leave Management System for nurses (MVP), and a Dispute & Complaint Management System for all user types. Performance optimizations including edge-level authentication, database indexes, and loading skeleton screens have also been applied.

A professional landing homepage has been built and is live. Mobile responsiveness is currently being refined across all dashboards. The system is deployed and accessible for testing at the provided URL.

✅ What's Complete
✓Public homepage (landing page)
✓User authentication (login/signup/logout)
✓Role-based access control (4 roles)
✓Patient booking flow (full end-to-end)
✓Nurse/Provider portal & profile
✓Hospital portal & booking system
✓Admin portal with full management
✓Leave management system (MVP)
✓Complaint & dispute system (MVP)
✓Notification system
✓Agreement management
✓ID Card generation
✓Service master & categories
✓Performance optimization
✓Mobile-responsive layout
🔄 In Progress / Pending
○Payment gateway integration
○SMS / WhatsApp notifications
○Advanced analytics & reports
○Mobile polish (final pass)
○Arabic language support (RTL)
○Production domain & SSL setup
○Final branding & logo
○Email notification templates
○Advanced scheduling system
○AI-powered nurse matching

Screenshots Walkthrough
Visual reference of all completed sections
3.1 — Public Website
Homepage — Desktop View (1440px)
Full landing page: navbar, hero section with provider cards, trust badges, how it works, specialties, featured providers, features, testimonials, CTA, and footer.
Homepage — Mobile (390px)
Mobile-responsive homepage with collapsible navigation.
Hero Section — Above Fold
Hero: headline, CTA buttons, live provider cards, stats.
Login Page — Desktop
Email/password login with role-based redirect after auth.
Login Page — Mobile
Mobile login — fully responsive auth card layout.
Signup Page — Role Selection
Registration page with role selector: Patient, Nurse, or Hospital. Each role gets a tailored onboarding flow after signup.

3.2 — Patient Portal
ℹ️ Note for client: Patient portal screenshots require an authenticated patient test account. The system is fully functional — please use the testing credentials provided separately to access and review these screens. All pages listed below are complete and operational.
PageRouteDescriptionStatus
Patient Dashboard/patient/dashboardKPI cards (active/pending bookings), recent bookings table, quick actions✅ Complete
Book a Nurse/patient/booking6-step booking wizard: service → nurse search → date/time → confirm✅ Complete
My Bookings/patient/bookingsFull booking history with status filters and detail view✅ Complete
Booking Detail/patient/bookings/[id]Full booking info, status timeline, payment status, confirm/cancel actions✅ Complete
Complaints/patient/complaintsSubmit complaint (with booking link, type, description, image), view history✅ Complete
Messages/patient/messagesIn-app messaging interface✅ Complete
My Profile/patient/profileEdit personal information, contact details✅ Complete
Onboarding/patient/onboardingFirst-time patient setup flow✅ Complete
🔍 Patient Booking Flow — Step by Step
1
Select Service
Choose from available service categories (General Nursing, Cardiac Care, IV Therapy, etc.)
2
Choose Nurse
Search and filter nurses by city, availability, and specialty. View profile and ratings.
3
Pick Date & Time
Select booking date, shift (morning/evening/night), duration, and booking type.
4
Enter Details
Provide address, city, and any special notes for the nurse.
5
Confirm Booking
Review summary and submit. Nurse receives instant notification.
6
Track Status
Monitor booking status from pending → accepted → in-progress → completed.

4
Client Testing Steps
Step-by-step guide to test all major flows
Before you start: Use the test credentials provided separately to log in as each user type. The system URL will be provided by the development team. We recommend testing on both desktop (Chrome/Edge) and mobile.
FLOW 1 Patient — Full Booking Flow
1
Login as Patient
Go to /auth/login → enter patient test email & password → verify redirect to /patient/dashboard
/auth/login
2
Explore Dashboard
Check KPI cards show correct counts. Review recent bookings list.
/patient/dashboard
3
Create a Booking
Click "Book a Nurse" → select a service category → search/select a nurse → choose date, shift, city → confirm booking
/patient/booking
4
Track Your Booking
Go to My Bookings → find your new booking → check status shows "Pending" → open detail view
/patient/bookings
5
Submit a Complaint
Go to Complaints → click "Submit Complaint" → select booking, type, add description → submit → verify it appears in list
/patient/complaints
6
Check Notifications
Click the bell icon → verify a notification appeared for your booking
/patient/dashboard
FLOW 2 Nurse — Accept Booking & Submit Leave
1
Login as Nurse
Go to /auth/login → enter nurse/provider test credentials → verify redirect to /provider/dashboard
/auth/login
2
Review Pending Requests
Check the "Pending Requests" section on dashboard. You should see the patient's booking from Flow 1.
/provider/dashboard
3
Accept Booking
Click View → on booking detail, click Accept (or Decline) → confirm action → check status updates
/provider/bookings
4
Manage Availability
Go to Availability → set your available shifts for the week → save
/provider/availability
5
Submit Leave Request
Go to Leave → click "Request Leave" → select date, type (full/half day), add reason → submit
/provider/leave
6
Submit a Complaint
Go to Complaints → submit a complaint about a booking → verify it appears in list
/provider/complaints
FLOW 3 Hospital — Staffing Request
1
Login as Hospital
Enter hospital test credentials → redirect to /hospital/dashboard
/auth/login
2
Review Dashboard
Check agreement status, pending booking alerts, billing summary
/hospital/dashboard
3
Create Staffing Request
Go to Book Nurses → fill in period, shifts, department, number of nurses needed → submit
/hospital/booking
4
Check Agreements
Go to Agreements → review any pending service agreements → accept if applicable
/hospital/agreements
5
Manage Departments
Go to Departments → add or edit a department
/hospital/departments
FLOW 4 Admin — Approvals & Management
1
Login as Admin
Enter admin credentials → redirect to /admin/dashboard
/auth/login
2
Review Dashboard KPIs
Check total nurses, pending approvals count, booking stats
/admin/dashboard
3
Approve a Nurse
Go to Nurse Approvals → find a pending nurse → review documents → Approve
/admin/nurses
4
Review a Booking
Go to Booking Management → find the patient booking from Flow 1 → review details
/admin/bookings
5
Handle Leave Request
Go to Leave Requests → find the nurse leave from Flow 2 → check if it conflicts with bookings → approve or reject
/admin/leave
6
Resolve a Complaint
Go to Complaints → find a complaint → add admin note → Mark Resolved or Reject
/admin/complaints
7
Check Settings
Go to Settings → review platform feature flags (nurse approval mode, advance booking hours)
/admin/settings
NurseCare+ UAT Report — Section 4: Testing Steps CONFIDENTIAL 22 April 2026
5
Feedback & Decisions Required
Client input needed to proceed with next development phase
⚠️ Action Required: The items below require your decision before development can continue on the next phase. Please review each point and provide written confirmation or feedback.
💳
Payment Gateway
Which payment provider should be integrated? Options: Mada, STC Pay, Stripe, PayTabs, HyperPay. This affects the entire payment module architecture.
Client response:
📱
SMS / WhatsApp Notifications
Which SMS provider for OTP and notifications? Options: Twilio, Unifonic, Zain SMS, Msegat. Required for Arabic SMS support.
Client response:
🎨
Final Branding & Logo
Please confirm the final logo, brand colors, and tagline. The current design uses the NurseCare+ name — if this changes it affects many screens.
Client response:
💰
Nurse Pricing Rules
How should nurse pricing work? Fixed rate per service? Hourly? Should hospitals get discounted rates? Custom per-nurse pricing?
Client response:
🌐
Production Domain
What is the final domain name? e.g. nursecare.sa, nursecare.com.sa. Needed for SSL certificate and Supabase auth settings.
Client response:
🕌
Arabic Language (RTL)
When should Arabic support be added? This is a significant change affecting all UI components. Recommend Phase 3 after full testing.
Client response:
🏥
Hospital Workflow Details
Does the hospital booking flow match your real operational process? Are there steps missing (e.g. department head approval, contract types)?
Client response:
📊
Reports & Analytics
Which reports are needed first? Nurse performance, revenue, booking trends, city-wise stats? Required to build the analytics module.
Client response:
🔔
Notification Preferences
Should users receive email notifications in addition to in-app? What events should trigger WhatsApp messages?
Client response:
📋
Contract / Agreement Templates
Please provide the actual service agreement templates in DOCX format so we can implement the proper legal text generation.
Client response:
NurseCare+ UAT Report — Section 5: Decisions Required CONFIDENTIAL 22 April 2026
6
Pending — Next Development Phase
Planned work after client approval of current phase
Phase 4A
High Priority
Payment Integration
Integrate selected payment gateway. Patient checkout flow. Invoice generation. Hospital billing module. Payment status tracking.
Phase 4B
High Priority
SMS & Notifications
Twilio/Unifonic SMS integration. WhatsApp notifications for bookings. Email templates. Push notifications (PWA).
Phase 5A
Medium Priority
Mobile Polish (Final)
Final responsive pass on all dashboards. Native-feeling mobile UX. Bottom navigation bar for mobile. PWA setup.
Phase 5B
Medium Priority
Arabic Language
Full RTL layout support. Arabic translations for all UI. Bilingual toggle. Arabic date/time formatting.
Phase 6A
Medium Priority
Analytics & Reports
Revenue dashboards. Nurse performance reports. Booking trends. Export to PDF/Excel. City-wise statistics.
Phase 6B
Low Priority
Advanced AI Features
AI-powered nurse matching. Smart scheduling suggestions. Predictive availability. Rating algorithm improvements.
Phase 7
High Priority
Production Deploy
Vercel production deployment. Custom domain SSL. Supabase production DB. Environment hardening. Security audit.
Phase 8
Medium Priority
QA & Load Testing
Full regression testing. Load testing for concurrent bookings. Security penetration testing. Performance benchmarking.
📅 Estimated Timeline
PhaseEstimated DurationDependencyPriority
Phase 4A — Payment2–3 weeksGateway selection from clientHigh
Phase 4B — SMS/Notifications1–2 weeksSMS provider selection from clientHigh
Phase 5A — Mobile Polish1–2 weeksClient UAT approvalMedium
Phase 5B — Arabic/RTL2–3 weeksFinal branding confirmationMedium
Phase 6A — Reports1–2 weeksReport requirements from clientMedium
Phase 7 — Production Deploy1 weekDomain, all phases completeHigh

Approval & Sign-Off
Client acknowledgement of completed work and direction for next phase
Please review this document and the live system, then complete this approval form and return it to the development team. Your signature confirms you have reviewed the completed work and authorizes proceeding to the next development phase.
Phase Approval Status
✅ Approved — Work is complete as described. Proceed to next phase.
🔄 Approved with Minor Changes — Proceed but fix items noted below.
⏸️ Changes Required Before Approval — Hold next phase until issues resolved.
❌ Rejected — Significant issues found. Full review meeting required.
